question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list any main sections or chapters of the thesis; it only contains an introduction. Therefore, it fails to meet the requirement of listing chapters.

question: Description
feedback: There is no brief description of the contents of each section. The introduction only outlines the problem and context, not the individual sections.

question: Structure
feedback: From this text alone, the overall structure of the thesis cannot be inferred. It only presents an introductory overview without indicating how the work is organized.
